entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`songId` INTEGER NOT NULL, `title` TEXT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(`songId`))
CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` USING FTS5(`title`, tokenize=`unicode61`, content=`Song`)
contentSyncTriggers: CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_SongFts_BEFORE_UPDATE BEFORE UPDATE ON `Song` BEGIN DELETE FROM `SongFts` WHERE `rowid`=OLD.`rowid`; END
CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_SongFts_BEFORE_DELETE BEFORE DELETE ON `Song` BEGIN DELETE FROM `SongFts` WHERE `rowid`=OLD.`rowid`; END
CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_SongFts_AFTER_UPDATE AFTER UPDATE ON `Song` BEGIN INSERT INTO `SongFts`(`rowid`, `title`) VALUES (NEW.`rowid`, NEW.`title`); END
CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_SongFts_AFTER_INSERT AFTER INSERT ON `Song` BEGIN INSERT INTO `SongFts`(`rowid`, `title`) VALUES (NEW.`rowid`, NEW.`title`); END

entities.createSql: CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` USING FTS5(`title`, `content`, tokenize=`unicode61`)

setupQueries: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS room_master_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,identity_hash TEXT)
